description: Case style: Stainless steel round case Dial style: Black dial with silver and white coloured hands  Strap style: Steel strap with butterfly clasp Features: Branding on the 12 and 6 hour mark, a screw to reset time and date aperture at the 3 hour mark  Waterproof to 3 ATM, wearable around sinks and in mild rains Warranty:  1 year
